channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 15.5%.

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Today's Inside Politics: some brief thoughts from me about the resignations that hit Keir Starmer's government yesterday, and a very interesting bit from @jenwilliamsft.bsky.social on the joke that ruined the Burnham-...

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer’s leadership under further pressure after defence ministers quit – UK politics live

item.title: Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: Yep @jenwilliamsft.bsky.social's Friday pieces on Burnham in Stephen's newsletter have been consistently excellent and insightful.
item.description: Yep @jenwilliamsft.bsky.social's Friday pieces on Burnham in Stephen's newsletter have been consistently excellent and insightful.
